zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord William Douglas 4th Of Drumlanrig於1430年出生在蘇格蘭Forfarshire登迪時，他的父親Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig15歲，母親Margaret Carlyle20歲。他於1455年之前與Elizabeth Crichton Of Sanquhar在蘇格蘭度福利爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1484年7月22日在蘇格蘭費伏可倫享年54歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord William Douglas 4th Of Drumlanrig于1430年出生在苏格兰Forfarshire登迪时，他的父亲Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig15岁，母亲Margaret Carlyle20岁。他于1455年之前与Elizabeth Crichton Of Sanquhar在苏格兰度福利爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1484年7月22日在苏格兰費伏可倫享年54岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord William Douglas 4th Of Drumlanrig was born in 1430, in Dundee, Forfarshire, Scotland, his father, Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig, was 15 and his mother, Margaret Carlyle, was 20. He married Elizabeth Crichton Of Sanquhar before 1455, in Dumfriesshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 22 July 1484, in Cluny, Fife, Scotland, at the age of 54, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord William Douglas 4th Of Drumlanrig est né en 1430, à Dundee, Forfarshire, Écosse, son père, Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Margaret Carlyle, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Crichton Of Sanquhar avant 1455, à Dumfriesshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 22 juillet 1484, à Cluny, Fife, Écosse, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord William Douglas 4th Of Drumlanrig 1430 in Dundee, Forfarshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig 15 und seine Mutter Margaret Carlyle 20. Er hat vor 1455 in Dumfriesshire, Scotland Elizabeth Crichton Of Sanquhar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 22. Juli 1484 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Cluny, Fife, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

Lui sposato Elizabeth Crichton Of Sanquhar prima del 1455, nel Dumfriesshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. ko.lifeSummary: Lord William Douglas 4th Of Drumlanrig(이)가 1430년 스컷랜드 Forfarshire 던디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Carlyle(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1455년 이전 스컷랜드 드프리실르에서 Elizabeth Crichton Of Sanquhar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1484년 7월 22일 스컷랜드 피프 클루니에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord William Douglas 4th Of Drumlanrig родился в 1430 г. в местности дунди, Forfarshire, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir William Douglas 3rd Baron of Drumlanrig было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Carlyle, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Crichton Of Sanquhar перед 1455 г. в местности думфриессхир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 22 июля 1484 г. в местности клуни, фиф, Шотландия в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.
